events.title: Osaka Fringe 2026 / Osaka Culture Expo platform
events.time: Festival window Oct 8-Nov 8; individual programme TBA
events.status: Festival window confirmed; individual programme pending
events.description: A citywide open-access arts festival announced by the Osaka Convention and Tourism Bureau. Treat as a source to revisit once programme details publish.
events.tip: Because exact performances were not published yet, the site marks this as a platform rather than individual events.

events.title: teamLab Botanical Garden Osaka
events.time: Night opening; October seasonal hours TBA
events.status: Permanent installation; official October hours not yet posted
events.description: Open-air night digital-art installation in Nagai Botanical Garden, useful as a flexible evening plan once October hours are released.
events.tip: Wear comfortable shoes; the venue itself warns that the park is dark and paths can be rough.

events.title: Doyama LGBTQ+ Nightlife Guide
events.status: Relaxed-confirmation add: current venue guide; individual event schedules vary
events.description: Curated LGBTQ+ venue guide for Doyama, Minami, and Shinsekai with men-only, women-only, and mixed filters.
events.tip: Use this as the gay-nightlife base layer, especially around Rainbow Festa weekend.

events.title: Tsunagary Cafe Osaka: LGBTQ+ community schedule watch
events.status: Schedule watch: current postings reached summer 2026 at verification time
events.description: Osaka LGBTQ+ community-event organizer with categories for gay, everyone, A-spectrum, lesbian, and related gatherings.
events.tip: Watch for October postings, especially smaller community events beyond club nightlife.

events.title: do with cafe: nightly drag-show venue watch
events.time: Nightly shows noted; verify same-day hours
events.status: Relaxed-confirmation add: venue guide says drag shows every night
events.description: Doyama restaurant/bar listed as having drag-queen shows every night.
events.tip: A strong local gay nightlife candidate, but verify the exact night and reservation situation.

events.title: Billboard Live Osaka: Kei Aran 35th Live with Kazutaka Ishii
events.venue: Billboard Live Osaka, HERBIS PLAZA ENT

events.title: Kawasaki Takaya: Hikigatari Fan Club Tour "Luv Letter vol.1"
events.status: Listed on Kyodo Osaka October 2026 calendar
events.description: Missed Osaka live-house concert option on the first full trip day; Kyodo lists the BIGCAT run as Oct 8-9.
events.tip: Good low-friction evening if you want to stay around Shinsaibashi.

events.title: Aki Sasamoto's Life Laboratory
events.venue: The National Museum of Art, Osaka
events.status: Official exhibition dates cover trip window
events.sourceName: The National Museum of Art, Osaka
events.description: Contemporary-art special exhibition running July 19-Nov 3, 2026.
events.tip: Pair with Nakanoshima architecture, cafés, or the nearby Nakanoshima Museum show.

events.title: Andrew Wyeth Exhibition
events.status: Official exhibition dates cover trip window
events.description: Major Andrew Wyeth exhibition running Oct 3-Dec 6, 2026 at Abeno Harukas Art Museum.
events.tip: Pair with Harukas 300, Shinsekai, or Tennoji Park.

events.title: Dynamic Ming Calligraphy: Treasures from the Taipei Ho Chuang-Shih Collection
events.venue: Osaka City Museum of Fine Arts
events.time: 9:30-17:00; closed Mondays unless holiday policy applies
events.status: Official exhibition dates cover trip window
events.sourceName: Osaka City Museum of Fine Arts
events.description: Special exhibition of Ming and Qing calligraphy from the Ho Chuang-Shih collection, running Oct 9-Dec 20, 2026.
events.tip: Good cultural anchor for a Tennoji/Shinsekai day.

events.title: EXPO'70 Pavilion: 1970 Osaka Expo Before/After Exhibition
events.time: Runs through Feb 28, 2027; check park hours
events.description: Official Expo Park exhibition on what happened to the 1970 Osaka Expo pavilions.
events.tip: Good if you want a post-Expo history thread outside central Osaka.

events.title: Hokusai and Hiroshige-zukushi
events.time: Exhibition continues past trip; check museum hours
events.description: Exhibition presenting works by two major ukiyo-e artists, Hokusai and Hiroshige.
events.tip: Compact indoor option near Shinsaibashi/Namba shopping.

events.title: Special Exhibition: The Big Five Mass Extinctions
events.time: Museum hours; final days during trip
events.description: Special exhibition tracing life evolution through the five major mass extinctions.

events.title: Toward the 50th Anniversary Collection 1: Self / Action
events.venue: The National Museum of Art, Osaka
events.status: Official exhibition dates cover trip window
events.sourceName: The National Museum of Art, Osaka
events.description: Collection exhibition running July 19-Nov 3, 2026 at NMAO.
events.tip: Easy add-on if you are already at NMAO for Aki Sasamoto.

events.title: Nara for Culture / Musikfest Nara 2026
events.status: Festival period confirmed; check programme for exact daily events
events.description: Official Nara music/culture programme running May 1-Dec 31.

events.title: Universal Studios Japan 25th Anniversary: Discover U!!!
events.description: Official 25th-anniversary programme running during the trip, including special entertainment and anniversary experiences.
events.tip: I did not add USJ Halloween as a dated event because I did not find an official 2026 Halloween date announcement.

events.title: Universal Studios Japan: One Piece Premier Summer 2026
events.time: Runs through Nov 19; check show times
events.cost: Studio Pass and/or show ticket required

events.title: Daian-ji: Hidden Eleven-faced Kannon Special Opening
events.description: Autumn special opening listed for Oct 1-Nov 30.

events.title: Neo-Japanese Show "OVAS" Osaka High-Energy Night Show
events.time: Usually 18:30 and 20:30 start times; verify selected date
events.status: Bookable recurring show source; exact October availability should be verified
events.description: English-MC variety/night show in Dotonbori with magic, juggling, comedy, traditional instruments, and interactive elements.
events.tip: The later show is marked ages 18+ and includes continued nightclub admission in the listing.

events.title: PARCO Produce 2026: American Dream
events.description: Stage production listed on Kyodo Osaka for Oct 8-12.

events.title: UTAGE LIVE SHOW - Modern Japanese Taiko / Traditional Instruments
events.time: Usually Mon/Tue/Fri 19:30-20:30; Wed 17:00-18:00 and 19:30-20:30; verify dates
events.status: Recurring show source active; exact October seat availability should be verified
events.description: Tourist-accessible live show combining wadaiko, shamisen, shakuhachi and shinobue with visual elements.
events.tip: Good rainy-evening fallback near the Bay Area; verify the current schedule before booking.

events.title: Osaka live-house gig guide watch
events.status: Schedule watch: local gig guides active, October listings not yet posted
events.description: English-friendly local live-house guide for smaller Osaka gigs around Shinsaibashi, Horie, Fukushima, and nearby areas.
events.tip: Use closer to the trip to find more hyperlocal shows that major ticketing sites miss.

events.title: Toyotomi Brothers! Yamato Koriyama Taiga Drama Museum
events.venue: DMG MORI Yamato Koriyama Castle Hall, 1F Exhibition Room
events.description: Local history / NHK Taiga-related museum in Yamato Koriyama, active through the trip window.
events.tip: Good if you want a lower-key Nara-area town rather than only Nara Park.

events.title: Manufacturing World Osaka - Final Day
events.status: Official 2026 dates list Oct 7-9 at INTEX Osaka
events.description: Large manufacturing/technology trade show; included because you asked to broaden beyond tourist event categories.
events.tip: Only worthwhile if industry expos interest you; check admission eligibility and register in advance.

events.title: Mucha Art Expo Returns
events.time: Runs through Nov 29; check museum hours
events.description: Art Nouveau-focused exhibition at the Sakai Alphonse Mucha Museum.
events.tip: Good south-Osaka/Sakai add-on if you want a quieter museum day.

events.title: EXPO'70 Stamp Rally and EFE Global Learning Project
events.time: Runs through Feb 28, 2027; check park hours
events.description: Self-guided stamp-rally/learning project around Expo Park.
events.tip: Easy outdoor add-on if weather is good and you are in Suita.

events.title: Environment Conservation Volunteer Experience Course 2026
events.venue: Osaka ATC Green Eco Plaza and related locations
events.status: Relaxed-confirmation add: ongoing course; participation requirements likely apply
events.description: Hands-on environmental conservation course connected with Osaka ATC Green Eco Plaza.
events.tip: Only add to the day if preregistration and language fit your plans.

events.title: Expo'70 Park: Bamboo Conservation Volunteer Recruitment
events.time: Runs through Mar 14, 2027; advance application required
events.status: Official current listing; requires advance application
events.description: Local conservation volunteer program at Expo Park.
events.tip: Only practical if advance application, language, and schedule work for you.

events.title: History Lecture: Kinki Old Castles
events.time: Series through Nov 6; session dates vary
events.status: Relaxed-confirmation add: series listing current, session details require checking
events.description: Local lecture series on old castles of the Kinki region.
events.tip: Japanese-language pick for history fans; verify exact session and seat availability.

events.title: History Lecture: Sangokushi
events.time: Series through Oct 31; session dates vary
events.status: Relaxed-confirmation add: series listing current, session details require checking
events.description: Local history lecture series on Three Kingdoms themes.

events.title: Osaka Castle Park Digital Stamp Rally
events.venue: Osaka Castle Keep and surrounding park
events.status: Relaxed-confirmation add: current local guide listing
events.description: Self-guided digital stamp rally around Osaka Castle history and park landmarks.
events.tip: Good anytime you are already visiting Osaka Castle Park or Osaka-Jo Hall.

events.title: Namba Beer Garden BBQ Terrace
events.venue: Namba Beer Garden BBQ Terrace Namba-Shinsaibashi
events.description: Casual rooftop BBQ beer-garden option in the Namba/Shinsaibashi orbit.
events.tip: Easy to combine with Minami nightlife.

events.title: St. Regis Champagne and Beer Garden
events.description: Hotel beer garden listing with regional Japanese flavors and champagne focus.
events.tip: Good refined-weather-plan option around Honmachi/Shinsaibashi.

events.title: TRATTORIA AL POMPIERE: Italian Rooftop Beer Garden
events.description: Seasonal Italian rooftop beer garden in Umeda, listed through the long weekend.
events.tip: Useful fallback for easy first-weekend evenings near transit.

events.title: GRAND SLAM: LGBTQ+ mixed-bar event watch
events.status: Relaxed-confirmation add: venue guide notes special event days
events.description: All-gender LGBTQ+ and straight mixed bar welcoming local and overseas customers, with special event days noted.
events.tip: Good source to check for mixed queer nightlife rather than men-only parties.

events.title: Hasedera Morning Service
events.status: Nara official tourism lists this as held daily except Jan 1
events.description: Daily morning temple service at Hasedera, included as a flexible Nara cultural option.
events.tip: Requires an early start and transit planning from Osaka.

events.title: Taima-dera Chūnobo Autumn Special Exhibition
events.time: Exhibition period Sep 10-Nov 30; hours/details via source
events.description: Autumn temple exhibition with materials including Toyotomi Hideyoshi-related items, running through the trip window.
events.tip: More niche and local; best for a focused temple/history day.

events.title: Sumiyoshi Taisha: Hattatsu Mairi in October
events.time: All day shrine visit; check shrine hours
events.description: Monthly shrine visit associated with business prosperity and household safety.
events.tip: Good local culture stop on arrival day if you want something calm and non-ticketed.

events.title: Osaka Comedy Club: English stand-up schedule watch
events.venue: Osaka Comedy Club / ROR Comedy Club Osaka
events.status: Relaxed-confirmation add: current site advertises recurring English comedy; October listings not yet posted
events.description: English-language stand-up comedy option in Osaka, useful for low-friction evening entertainment.
events.tip: Check the site in September/October for exact dates and RSVP.

events.title: Kansai Comedy Osaka/Kyoto schedule watch
events.status: Schedule watch: current recurring comedy source; trip-window dates not posted yet
events.description: Kansai-based English stand-up community with Osaka and Kyoto shows.
events.tip: Watch for one-off showcases or Kyoto day-trip evening options.

events.title: Rainbow Festa! 2026 / Osaka Pride Weekend
events.sourceName: Japan Gay Guide + Rainbow Festa official
events.description: Kansai Rainbow Festa returns to Ogimachi Park with stage programming, booths, community groups, and Pride-weekend energy.
events.tip: Put this on the trip as a fixed anchor. It is the strongest confirmed LGBTQ+ event in the date range.

events.title: FM802 MINAMI WHEEL 2026
events.time: Three-day live-house circuit; lineup/times by pass schedule
events.description: One of Osaka Minami's major live-house circuit festivals, spread across more than 20 venues.
events.tip: Pairs well with Rainbow Festa weekend if you want Pride daytime plus music at night.

events.title: EXPLOSION Osaka: Pride-weekend party watch
events.status: Schedule watch: venue posts monthly events; October lineup not yet posted
events.description: Doyama gay club; current source shows monthly events and venue guide notes Saturday/holiday-eve parties.
events.tip: Check again closer to travel; this is the most likely official gay-club afterparty source.

events.title: Kyoto Music Expo 2026
events.description: Outdoor music festival in Umekoji Park with Quruli and a multi-artist lineup.
events.tip: A strong Kyoto day-trip option, but it overlaps Rainbow Festa and MINAMI WHEEL.

events.title: Nara Deer Antler-Cutting Ceremony - date watch
events.status: Tentative / annual October event; official source says mid-October not yet announced
events.description: Traditional Nara Park ceremony involving antler cutting at Rokuen. Included under relaxed confirmation because the official page lists mid-October but not exact 2026 dates yet.
events.tip: Watch closely; if dates land in your trip, this is one of the most distinctive Nara options.

events.title: Hiraoka Shrine Akigo Festival Pre-festival / Taikodai Floats
events.time: Oct 10 from 13:30; Oct 11 from 11:00 with taikodai events into evening
events.cost: Free to observe; food stalls extra
events.status: Annual schedule pattern from official shrine page; 2026 dates inferred from Sports Day weekend
events.description: Very local Osaka autumn festival option: taikodai drum floats enter Hiraoka Shrine on the weekend before Sports Day.
events.tip: This overlaps Pride weekend; consider it only if you want a local shrine-festival side quest.

events.title: Kishiwada Danjiri Festival - October District Festival
events.venue: East Kishiwada, Yagi, Yamataki and other district areas
events.time: Oct 10 eve festival; Oct 11 main festival
events.description: The October Kishiwada Danjiri festival covers multiple local districts south of central Osaka.
events.tip: This is not central Osaka. Plan transit and crowd logistics carefully.

events.title: ZUTOMAYO: Legacy Zombie Labo - Bunka Denrai
events.venue: Heijo Palace Site special outdoor venue

events.title: Disney on Classic: A Magical Night 2026 - Sakai
Fumiya Fujii Arena Live 2026: Future Pixels

events.tip: Good fit if you want live music before Doyama or Umeda nightlife.

events.time: 10:00-17:00; closed Mondays unless holiday policy applies
events.status: Current exhibition listing covers trip window

events.description: Exhibition beginning Oct 10, 2026 and running through Dec 20 at Nakanoshima Museum of Art.
events.tip: Check the museum page closer to October for ticketing and any Monday holiday closure changes.

events.title: Pocket Marche in Tsurumi Ryokuchi - 18th
events.description: Park market with shopping, crafts, and activity-style listings over the long weekend.
events.tip: Lower-key alternative to festival crowds; good daytime filler.

events.status: Nara official tourism month view lists monthly second-Saturday event
events.description: A local Buddhist culture lecture at Kofuku-ji. Likely Japanese-language, but useful for an exhaustive local calendar.

events.title: Weekend Cinema: Lee Miller
events.description: Saturday afternoon film screening at Peace Osaka.
events.tip: Indoor daytime option before Pride-related evening plans.

events.venue: Ogimachi Park and parade route TBA

events.title: Todai-ji Great Buddha Autumn Festival
events.time: 10:00 ceremony listed by Nara City Tourism

events.title: Hiraoka Shrine Akigo Festival Main Rite
events.status: Official annual ritual schedule lists the main rite on Oct 15
events.description: Formal harvest-thanksgiving rite at Hiraoka Shrine. The float/stall atmosphere is concentrated on the pre-festival weekend, not this main rite.
events.tip: Choose Oct 10-11 for festival energy; choose Oct 15 for a quieter ritual.

events.title: Senshu YOSAKOI Eejanaika Festival - October Date Watch
events.venue: Rinku Park, Rinku Pleasure Town Seacle, and nearby stages
events.status: Month confirmed by local tourism source; exact 2026 date TBA
events.description: Local yosakoi dance festival held every October near Kansai Airport/Rinku Town. Added as a watch lead because the exact 2026 date had not been posted.
events.tip: The placeholder date keeps it visible mid-trip; check the source closer to October before planning around it.

events.title: My Hair is Bad in Osaka
events.description: Rock show at Zepp Osaka Bayside near Universal City.
events.tip: Useful if you are already considering a USJ or bay-area day.

events.title: Novelbright in Osaka
events.description: Arena-scale J-Rock show at Osaka-Jo Hall.
events.tip: Friday-night option; book tickets early if this is a must-do.

events.title: Area 1: Friday free tarot night
events.status: Recurring listing in current venue guide; verify same week
events.description: Visit Gay Osaka notes Area 1 has free tarot readings every Friday from 19:00 at 3F.
events.tip: Good local queer nightlife option before/after dinner in Doyama.

events.title: Masayuki Suzuki in Kyoto
events.description: Kyoto concert option at ROHM Theatre Kyoto.
events.tip: Works best if you are already making a Kyoto day trip on Oct 16.

events.title: 38th Naniwa Yodogawa Fireworks Festival
events.venue: Yodogawa riverbed, downstream from Shin-Midosuji bridge to National Route 2
events.cost: Free public viewing; paid seating may be separate
events.description: Large Osaka fireworks event on the Yodogawa riverbed, listed for Oct 17.
events.tip: Major crowd event. Build the day around transit, dinner timing, and exit routes.

events.title: Sumiyoshi Taisha: Takaranoichi Shinji and Masu no Ichi
events.description: Traditional shrine market/festival listing at Sumiyoshi Taisha.
events.tip: Can be paired with south Osaka exploration, but leave time if also doing fireworks.

events.title: My Hair is Bad in Osaka
events.description: Second Osaka date for My Hair is Bad at Zepp Osaka Bayside.
events.tip: Conflicts with the Yodogawa fireworks and Novelbright; pick based on interest.

events.title: Novelbright in Osaka
events.description: Second arena date by Novelbright at Osaka-Jo Hall.
events.tip: Same evening as Yodogawa fireworks; check transit crowding.

events.tip: Could pair with Osaka Castle Park before the evening fireworks.

Beautyworld Osaka 2026
events.description: Major beauty and cosmetics trade show for Western Japan, with Osaka Nail Forum concurrently.
events.tip: This is added as an expanded-category option, not a general tourist attraction.

events.title: Kinpusen-ji Nancho Myohoden Thousand-Sutra Heart Sutra Rite
events.status: Nara official tourism month view lists monthly 19th event
events.description: Local Yoshino temple rite listed for the 19th of each month.
events.tip: Yoshino is a longer day trip than central Nara; check transit before committing.

events.title: CA7RIEL and Paco Amoroso in Osaka
events.description: Departure-day evening concert at Namba Hatch.
events.tip: Only practical if your departure timing leaves the evening free.

events.title: Toji Kobo-ichi Market
events.description: Historic monthly flea market at Toji Temple, with roughly 1,000 stalls according to the current listing.
events.tip: Departure-day only; feasible if leaving from Kyoto/Shin-Osaka later in the day.

events.title: Shitenno-ji Flea Market
events.status: Monthly pattern source: held on the 21st and 22nd every month
events.description: Large Osaka temple flea market held monthly on the 21st and 22nd; Oct 21 falls on departure day.
events.tip: Better than Kyoto if you want a low-friction final morning near Tennoji.

events.title: Toshodaiji Shaka Nenbutsu-e - Departure Day Option
events.description: Included as an optional departure-day item only because the trip leaves on Oct 21.

watchSources.name: Visit Gay Osaka events
watchSources.why: Official LGBTQ+ tourism site supported by Osaka tourism. Its events page had no October 2026 postings at verification time, so it is linked as a watch source rather than dated calendar items.

watchSources.name: Tsunagary Cafe Osaka schedule
watchSources.why: LGBTQ+ community gatherings in Osaka/Kyoto/Kobe. At verification time, announced events only extended into summer 2026.

watchSources.name: EXPLOSION Osaka
watchSources.why: Doyama gay club with monthly parties. The live schedule at verification time showed July/August events, not October yet.

watchSources.name: Rainbow Festa official news
watchSources.why: Best place to watch for Pride booth, parade route, volunteer, and possible afterparty information.

watchSources.name: Kyodo Osaka October 2026 calendar
watchSources.why: Best month-level source for large concerts, theater, ballet, and arena events.

watchSources.name: eplus Osaka October 2026
watchSources.why: Useful ticketing source for family shows, exhibitions, interactive experiences, and additional concerts.

watchSources.name: Billboard Live Osaka October 2026

watchSources.name: Osaka Metro NiNE events
watchSources.why: Official/curated Osaka city events source to revisit closer to October.

watchSources.name: Nara official events calendar
watchSources.why: Official Nara City source for temple/shrine schedule updates and access notes.

watchSources.name: Visit Gay Osaka bars
watchSources.why: Best current LGBTQ+ nightlife layer for Doyama, Minami, and Shinsekai; exact nightly parties vary by venue.

watchSources.name: Osaka Comedy Club
watchSources.why: English comedy source with recurring Osaka shows; October 2026 listings should be checked closer to travel.

watchSources.name: Kansai Comedy
watchSources.why: Osaka/Kyoto English stand-up community with recurring and one-off shows; trip-window listings were not yet posted.

watchSources.name: JGIG Osaka gig guide
watchSources.why: Local live-house listings around Shinsaibashi, Amerikamura, Horie, and Fukushima; useful closer to October for small shows.

watchSources.name: Osaka Live House Guide
watchSources.why: Bilingual underground live-music guide with venue/district filters and database sync noted on the site.

watchSources.name: Sports Pride Promotion
